headline: Tyler 😈👨‍🔧 ROASTS Kirk 🪦💀 w/ DNA Rifle 🔫🧬 & Text Tea ☕💦
text: Prosecutors 🧑‍⚖️💼 served up DEVASTATING 🍆💦 evidence this week against 23yo Tyler Robinson 😈👨‍🔧, the gamer dropout who allegedly smoked Charlie Kirk 🪦💀 with Gramps’ modified rifle 🔫🧓. DNA on the gun and a towel wrap matched Tyler 🧬🍆 while texts to roomie-slash-bf Lance Twiggs 💅❤️ confessed the whole slay 🗡️😭. ‘I had enough of his hatred, some hate can’t be negotiated out’ 📱🔥 he texted after the rooftop snipe from 415ft away at Utah Valley U 🎓🏫. CCTV caught him buying Chick-fil-A 🐔🍟, eating it, then switching gait like a bad TikTok dance 💃🦵 before rolling onto the Losee roof and dropping with the murder stick. He even chatted up Turning Point USA reps before the hit 🤝😎. After the shot heard round the campus, Tyler hid the rifle in bushes 🌳🔫 but texted Twiggs ‘squad car parked right by it’ 🚔😩 and ‘sorry for roping you in’ while the manhunt raged. ‘Remember how I was engraving bullets?’ he joked, and sure enough casings read ‘Hey Fascist! Catch!’ 🖕💥. The next day he showed up nervous, crying, wishing he hadn’t done it 😢💦 then tried to turn himself in wearing Converse 👟 and a maroon shirt. Judge Graf 👨‍⚖️ now holds Tyler’s fate after four days of ‘overwhelming, devastating’ testimony 🗣️🔥 while Erika Kirk and the fam wiped tears 😭👨‍👩‍👧‍👦. No plea yet, but the texts, DNA, and rooftop footage are giving main-character energy that screams trial time ⏰⚖️. Don Jr and wife watched the whole tea spill 🍵👀 while defense tried to poke holes like Swiss cheese 🧀🔍. Utah County’s about to decide if this 23yo assassin gets the death-penalty chair 🪑💀 or walks free. Spoiler: the evidence is serving life sentence already 📜🔒.
